meaning: adj.胸襟狭窄的,吝啬的,不充足的
examples: This was a typically ungenerous response.
There was nothing mean or ungenerous in the young man's heart.
A base, ungenerous wretch who under the mask of friendship has undone me.
More have come since, but Britain is still relatively ungenerous and is planning to tighten its asylum laws.
Readers provided almost 1, 000 comments, mostly astute (even when ungenerous to this writer).
